top_signals.title: Citi Sees India IPOs Hitting Fresh Records Despite Challenges
top_signals.summary: Initial public offerings in India should get back on track in the second half of the year, according to Citigroup Inc., moving on from a rocky start that’s seen foreign investors withdraw capital and the rupee slide.
